summary: Delivery performance is stable with improving quality and schedule confidence.
highlights: Quality score increased for three consecutive periods.
Approval turn-around improved by 18% since previous checkpoint.
risks: Vendor procurement remains on the critical path for deployment.

opportunities: Shift two integration stories left to reduce schedule pressure.
Use standby approvers to prevent bottlenecks during peak reviews.
data_quality_notes: One stale risk review record older than 14 days.
